summary: Soundboard recording (levels a bit low) of an energetic Buffalo show with a killer first set and standout High Time.
review: The SBD capture is clear enough for most listeners, though the mix sits slightly low. Musically the band delivers a high‑energy performance – a long, grooving first set highlighted by a rousing "Don't Ease Me In" and a spectacular "High Time" in the second half. Overall the show feels magical and well‑received by fans.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviews are strongly positive, praising both performance and sound quality; recording is solid (soundboard) and the show is described as magical with standout moments.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Nice SBD source, generally clear; some reviewers note the levels are a little low but no major distortion or drop‑outs mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fans rave about the long, groove‑filled first set and a high‑energy second set; overall setlist is called "FAT" and flows well, keeping the vibe enthusiastic throughout.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland receives a shout‑out for his performance (mentioned as great in person).
